Only the hash of the order is stored."},"distributeLPRebate(bytes32)":{"notice":"Distribute accrued LP rebates back to the pool via donation."},"revealOrder(bytes32,bytes32,uint128,bool,bytes32,uint256[2],uint256[2][2],uint256[2])":{"notice":"Reveal and execute a matured commitment using a ZK proof."},"unlockCallback(bytes)":{"notice":"Called by the pool manager on `msg.sender` when the manager is unlocked"}},"notice":"Privacy-preserving TWAMM hook for Uniswap v4. Order lifecycle:   1. commitOrder()  \u2014 stores only a hash of the order (ZK commitment). No order details on-chain.   2. revealOrder()  \u2014 after expiry, owner submits ZK proof + plaintext order.                       Proof verifies hash(plaintext) == stored commitment without                       the pool ever having seen the order before execution.   3. afterSwap      \u2014 executes accumulated virtual orders as a TWAMM batch,                       accrues LP shield rebate from virtual spread.   4. distributeLPRebate() \u2014 donates accrued rebate back to in-range LPs. Hook flags required in deployment address: BEFORE_SWAP_FLAG | params.delay: Seconds until the order becomes executable.
params.hash: Poseidon(owner, amountIn, zeroForOne, salt) — computed off-chain.

params.salt: Salt used when computing the commitment hash.

params.data: The data that was passed to the call to unlock

returns._0: Any data that you want to be returned from the unlock call

LP_REBATE_BPS().notice: LP shield rebate in basis points.

commitOrder(bytes32,bytes32,uint64).notice: Commit a hidden order. Only the hash of the order is stored.

distributeLPRebate(bytes32).notice: Distribute accrued LP rebates back to the pool via donation.

revealOrder(bytes32,bytes32,uint128,bool.notice: Reveal and execute a matured commitment using a ZK proof.

unlockCallback(bytes).notice: Called by the pool manager on `msg.sender` when the manager is unlocked
